summary: Comprehensive testing of Polls & Voting feature and DB optimization (aggregation queries). All 24 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests confirm polls navigation, creation form, voting, close/delete buttons all work correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py is 2699 lines - consider splitting poll endpoints into separate module for maintainability
Poll endpoints correctly enforce role-based access (organizer+ for create/close/delete)
Proper privacy protection: voter_ids stripped from API response, only vote_count and voted_by_me exposed
MongoDB aggregation pipelines correctly implemented for funds calculations
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user notiftest2@kindred.app. Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_ prefixed polls.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Polls & Voting feature fully functional. Backend endpoints: GET /api/polls (list with vote_count/voted_by_me per option), POST /api/polls (create - organizer+ only), POST /api/polls/{id}/vote (cast vote), POST /api/polls/{id}/close (close poll - organizer+ only), DELETE /api/polls/{id} (delete - organizer+ only). Frontend: Polls nav link at /polls with data-testid='nav-link-polls', polls page (data-testid='polls-page'), create form (polls-create-form), poll cards (poll-card-{id}), vote options (poll-option-{id}), close/delete buttons (poll-close-{id}, poll-delete-{id}). DB optimizations tested: /api/courtyard/home returns funds_total, /api/payments/summary returns total_paid, /api/community/overview returns funds_raised - all use MongoDB aggregation pipelines.
features_tested: GET /api/polls returns polls with vote_count and voted_by_me per option
POST /api/polls creates poll with options (organizer+ only)
POST /api/polls/{id}/vote records vote and updates counts
POST /api/polls/{id}/close closes the poll (organizer+ only)
DELETE /api/polls/{id} deletes poll (organizer+ only)
Voting on closed poll returns error (400 - This poll is closed)
Single-select poll rejects multiple option_ids (400)
Multi-select poll allows allow_multiple flag
Polls page nav link visible and navigates correctly
Poll creation form: add/remove options, submit creates poll
Clicking option casts vote and shows updated percentage bar
Close poll button visible for organizer+ roles
Delete poll button visible for organizer+ roles
Empty state test not triggered (existing poll present)
DB optimization: /api/courtyard/home returns funds_total correctly
DB optimization: /api/payments/summary returns total_paid correctly
DB optimization: /api/community/overview returns funds_raised correctly
Privacy: voter_ids stripped from poll options in API response
Poll validation: minimum 2 options required (422 error)
Poll validation: nonexistent poll returns 404
Poll validation: invalid option_id returns 400
